languages.text: "Медикарии и так работают на пределе. Ждите спокойно, не шумите!"
"The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"
languages.original_text: "Медикарии и так работают на пределе. Ждите спокойно, не шумите!"

traits.locale_text: "The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"
"The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"
"The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"

languages.text: 「医官は限界まで働いている。静かに待て、騒ぎ立てないで！」
languages.original_text: "The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"

languages.text: "Sıhhiye subaylarının heyheyleri tepelerinde zaten. Sessizce bekle, yaygara koparma sakın!"
languages.original_text: "The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"

traits.locale_text: "Sıhhiye subaylarının heyheyleri tepelerinde zaten. Sessizce bekle, yaygara koparma sakın!"

languages.text: “医务官们已超负荷运转。安静候诊，不要喧哗！”
languages.original_text: "The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"

traits.locale_text: “医务官们已超负荷运转。安静候诊，不要喧哗！”

languages.text: "Die Medicae-Offiziere sind total am Limit. Also warte einfach und mach keinen Ärger."
languages.original_text: "The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"

traits.locale_text: "Die Medicae-Offiziere sind total am Limit. Also warte einfach und mach keinen Ärger."

languages.text: « Les officiers de medicae sont surbookés. Alors, patientez en silence ! Inutile de faire une scène ! »
languages.original_text: "The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"

traits.locale_text: « Les officiers de medicae sont surbookés. Alors, patientez en silence ! Inutile de faire une scène ! »

languages.text: «Los oficiales de medicae ya están al límite. ¡Esperen con paciencia y sin alboroto!».
languages.original_text: "The medicae officers are already at their limit. Wait quietly, don't make a fuss!"
